title: MRC Engine Layout Config
description: Schema for the pw_mobile_remote_control_engine layout configuration file (config.json).

minClientVersion.description: Minimum compatible client version (semver). Clients older than this will be rejected.

initialScreen.description: The screen key shown first when the app loads. Must match a key in 'screens'.

templates.description: Named, reusable component definitions. Reference them in a screen layout using type='template' + templateId.

screens.description: All screens in the app. Each key is the screen identifier used with initialScreen and server navigation events.

orientation.description: Device orientation mode. 'auto' uses separate landscape/portrait layout arrays per screen.

keepAwake.description: Prevent the device screen from sleeping while the app is in the foreground.

useSafeArea.description: Apply device safe-area insets (notch / home indicator) to the root layout.

assetsBaseUrl.description: Base URL prepended to all relative texture paths.

defaultCooldown.description: Global default cooldown (ms) between repeated button presses. Can be overridden per button.

lockSafetyTimeout.description: Auto-unlock timeout (ms) if a LOAD_SCREEN message never arrives after locking.

ThemeConfig.description: Visual design tokens shared across all screens.

fonts.description: Named remote font map. Key = font family name used in 'style.fontFamily'; value = TTF URL.

background.description: Default background for all screens unless overridden at screen level.

styles.description: Named style presets. Reference them in elements via '@styles.<name>'.

BackgroundConfig.description: Screen/theme background. Either a CSS color string, a remote image URL, or an object with a local texture filename.

oneOf.description: CSS color (e.g. '#1a1a2e') or remote image URL.

StyleValue.description: A React Native style object. Accepts any valid RN ViewStyle / TextStyle / ImageStyle keys.

ScreenConfig.description: A single screen definition. Use 'layout' for a fixed-orientation screen or 'layouts' for orientation-aware screens.

layout.description: Flat element list for single-orientation screens (when settings.orientation is 'landscape' or 'portrait').

layouts.description: Per-orientation element lists. Used when settings.orientation is 'auto'.

Vector2.description: A 2D coordinate or size as [x, y] in logical pixels.

AnchorVector2.description: Normalized anchor point [x, y] in range [0, 1]. [0,0] = top-left, [1,1] = bottom-right, [0.5,0.5] = center.

HapticFeedback.description: Haptic feedback intensity triggered on press.

ButtonStateConfig.description: Visual overrides applied when a button enters a given state.

texture.description: Texture filename (relative to assetsBaseUrl) or full URL to display in this state.

scale.description: Uniform scale applied to the button in this state.

style.description: Style overrides merged on top of the base style in this state.

ElementConfig.description: Any layout element. Discriminated by the 'type' field.

ButtonElement.description: A pressable button that can send key codes or custom action events to the server.

id.description: Unique identifier within the screen. Used by PATCH_STATE to target this element.

action.description: Custom action name sent to the server when the button is tapped.

keyCode.description: Keyboard key code sent to the server (e.g. 'Enter', 'Backspace', 'Up').

texture.description: Default background texture filename or URL.

disabled.description: Initial disabled state. Can be toggled at runtime via PATCH_STATE.

visible.description: Initial visibility. Can be toggled at runtime via PATCH_STATE.

cooldown.description: Cooldown in ms between presses. Overrides settings.defaultCooldown for this button.

lockScreen.description: When true, pressing this button triggers a screen-lock state until the server sends LOAD_SCREEN.

hitbox.description: Extra touch area (dp) added around the button's visual bounds.

autoRepeat.description: Fire press events repeatedly while the button is held down.

repeatInterval.description: Interval in ms between auto-repeat events when autoRepeat is true.

actionPayload.description: Arbitrary key-value data merged into the action event payload.

style.description: Base style for the button and its text label. Use '@styles.<name>' to reference a theme preset.

oneOf.description: Reference to a named style preset, e.g. '@styles.controlButtonLabel'.

layout.description: Child elements rendered inside the button (for composite buttons).

TextElement.description: A static or server-updated text label.

id.description: Unique identifier. Target with PATCH_STATE to update 'text' or 'style' at runtime.

text.description: Initial text content. Supports '@data.<key>' tokens for server data injection.

oneOf.description: Reference to a named style preset, e.g. '@styles.controlButtonLabel'.

id.description: Unique identifier. Target with PATCH_STATE to swap 'texture' at runtime.

texture.description: Image filename (relative to assetsBaseUrl) or full URL.

ContainerElement.description: An invisible grouping element for compositing child elements.

layout.description: Child elements positioned relative to this container's top-left corner.

TemplateElement.description: An instance of a named template defined in the top-level 'templates' map.

templateId.description: Key of the template to instantiate from the 'templates' map.

KeyboardKey.description: A single keyboard key — either a plain character string or a fully configured key object.

oneOf.description: A single character that becomes the key label, action, and keyCode.
A fully configured special key (e.g. Pass, Clear, Delete).

id.description: Key identifier, also sent as the action name.

action.description: Action event name sent to the server when this key is pressed.

text.description: Label displayed on the key face.

KeyboardElement.description: An on-screen keyboard grid. Each cell is either a plain character or a fully configured KeyboardKey object.

gapX.description: Horizontal gap between keys in logical pixels.

gapY.description: Vertical gap between rows in logical pixels.

keySize.description: Default size [width, height] for all keys unless overridden per key.

rows.description: An ordered array of rows, each being an array of KeyboardKey entries.

states.description: Default state visuals applied to all keys unless overridden per key.

TouchpadElement.description: A trackpad surface that streams pointer delta or normalized position events to the server.

action.description: Action name sent to the server on each move event. Default: 'touchpad'.

mode.description: 'relative' sends dx/dy deltas; 'normalized' sends x/y in [0,1] relative to the touchpad size.

sensitivity.description: Multiplier applied to raw pixel deltas (relative mode only). Default: 1.

deadzone.description: Minimum pixel movement before a delta is reported. Default: 0.

continuous.description: Fire update events while dragging (true) or only on release (false). Default: true.

throttle.description: Throttle strategy: 'raf' syncs to display refresh (~16ms), a number sets a fixed interval in ms, 0 disables throttling.

sendReleaseEvent.description: Send a final {dx:0, dy:0} event when the finger lifts. Default: false.

tintColor.description: CSS color applied as a tint to the background texture.

showIndicator.description: Show a floating dot that follows the active touch point. Default: true.

indicatorSize.description: Diameter of the indicator dot in logical pixels. Default: 40.

indicatorTexture.description: Custom texture for the indicator dot.

clampIndicator.description: Prevent the indicator from leaving the touchpad bounds. Default: true.

resetOnRelease.description: Move the indicator back to center when the finger lifts. Default: true.

ProgressBarElement.description: A display-only fill bar. Its value is driven by the server via PATCH_STATE.

id.description: Used by PATCH_STATE to update 'value' at runtime.

value.description: Initial fill ratio in [0, 1]. Updated at runtime by the server.

direction.description: Direction in which the bar fills. Default: 'right'.

JoystickElement.description: An analog joystick that streams a normalized direction vector {x, y, magnitude} to the server.

action.description: Action name sent to the server on each move event. Default: 'joystick'.

deadzone.description: Normalized deadzone radius in [0, 1] relative to joystick radius. Inputs within report magnitude: 0. Default: 0.05.

throttle.description: Throttle strategy: 'raf' syncs to display refresh, a number sets a fixed ms interval.

sendReleaseEvent.description: Send a final zero-vector event when the finger lifts. Default: true.

texture.description: Background (base plate) texture filename or URL.

stickSize.description: Diameter of the stick knob in logical pixels. Default: half the component size.

stickTexture.description: Texture for the moveable stick knob.

DpadElement.description: A directional-pad composed of four buttons (up, down, left, right).

buttonSize.description: Size [width, height] of each individual directional button. Default: [80, 80].

radius.description: Distance from center to each button center in logical pixels. Default: buttonSize width.

hitbox.description: Extra touch area (dp) added around each button.

autoRepeat.description: Fire events repeatedly while a direction button is held. Default: false.

repeatInterval.description: Interval in ms between auto-repeat events. Only used when autoRepeat is true.

texture.description: Shared texture for all four directional buttons.

keyCodes.description: Override the key code sent for each direction.

text.description: Override the label on each directional button.
